purpose: Business-scenario UAT for OSAS WBSMS (minimum 5 required; 7 listed).

uat_cases.scenario_title: New student completes multi-section profiling and submits for review
uat_cases.expected_business_result: Profile saved with consent acknowledgements; status shows pending validation; student can view submitted profile.

uat_cases.scenario_title: OSAS faculty reviews and approves a pending student profile
uat_cases.expected_business_result: Profile status updated to approved; student receives notification; profile visible as current.

uat_cases.scenario_title: Student assistant searches student and records a violation
uat_cases.expected_business_result: Violation stored with correct student link; appears in violations list and dashboard metrics.

uat_cases.scenario_title: Student submits a concern; staff updates status
uat_cases.expected_business_result: Concern visible to staff; status change reflected for student; no duplicate records on single submit.

uat_cases.scenario_title: Administrator creates faculty account and assigns role
uat_cases.expected_business_result: New user can log in via institutional portal and access faculty dashboard only.
PDF downloads with current analytics; data matches on-screen dashboard.

uat_cases.scenario_title: Each role cannot access unauthorized modules
uat_cases.expected_business_result: 403 or redirect for unauthorized routes; student cannot access account management.
